retry_reason: On failure (e.g., ENOMEM or kthread_create_on_cpu failure), the function returns an error; retrying would be up to the caller, but the refcount operation itself is not the failure.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to create and set up a new smpboot kernel thread; the get_task_struct call is one step in the setup process, not the main purpose.
